Enter a phone number under an agent to load that call's date, length & outcome. Hire & Repair calls score on Opening В· Brand В· Call Recording В· Closing (25% each); other calls log a missed opportunity + notes. Saved on this device.

Hire & Repair QA scores

Scope. Campaign UK_Accident Management, inbound calls only, since launch (08:00 09/06/2026 UK). Source exports timestamp in AEST (UTC+10); all times shown converted to UK (BST, UTC+1).
Claims. Every claim in the Kindertons (Accident Claims Team) results sheet is counted, with its hire status (HStatus). Agent, client and fault party are enriched from the claims register (Dan Gee mapped to Daniel Gee); claim day uses DateReferred.
